title: Research Request
description: Input to the shared research sub-graph (aisop.research).

preferred_source_tiers.$comment: Optional (B3). Advisory ranking of source credibility tiers the research SHOULD prefer when gathering and grounding: tier1 = primary/authoritative (specs, standards bodies, official docs, source code), tier2 = reputable secondary (established vendors, peer-reviewed, recognized references), tier3 = community/unvetted (blogs, forums, AI-generated). Used by gather_sources to weight and by synthesize to label support strength; it does NOT relax any grounding rule and never substitutes for a real citation.
